headlines.description: — LaMelo Ball overcame an early head-to-head collision with coach Charles Lee to score 24 points, and the surging Charlotte Hornets fought back from...
headlines.shortLinkText: Hornets fight back from 22 down to beat Pelicans 102-95 for 7th straight victory

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Houston Rockets vs. Indiana Pacers: Game Highlights) 2026/02/03 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Alperen Sengun matched his season high with 39 points, and Jabari Smith Jr. added 19 to help the short-handed Houston Rockets overcome the absence of All-Star forward Kevin Durant to beat the Indiana Pacers 118-114 on Monday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Alperen Sengun scores 39 to help Rockets overcome Kevin Durant's absence and beat Pacers 118-114

headlines.description: — Jaren Jackson Jr. scored 30 points, Ty Jerome added 19 and Memphis built a 20-point lead in the second half and held on for a 137-128 victory over the Minnesota Timberwolves on Monday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Grizzlies snap a 6-game losing streak with a 137-128 victory over the Timberwolves

headlines.description: — Tyrese Maxey scored 29 points, including seven 3-pointers, Dominick Barlow added 26 points and 16 rebounds, and the Philadelphia 76ers beat the Los Angeles Clippers 128-113 on Monday night for their fourth consecutive victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Maxey's 29 points and seven 3-pointers lead 76ers to fourth straight win over Clippers
